scripts.dev: rm -f debug.log && npm run build:server && concurrently --kill-others -n server,vite,electron -c blue,green,yellow "tsx watch server/src/standalone.ts" "npm run dev -w client" "sleep 3 && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron server/dist/main.js"
scripts.start: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && npm run electron
scripts.start:standalone: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && node server/dist/standalone.js
